zh.lifeSummary: Anna Volk是Anna Uhl的女兒，於1660年10月2日出生在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。她於1687年5月3日與Johann Peter Kumpf Jr.在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1738年5月20日在她的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna Volk是Anna Uhl的女儿，于1660年10月2日出生在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。她于1687年5月3日与Johann Peter Kumpf Jr.在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1738年5月20日在她的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Volk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of various ancient Germanic personal names formed with the first element folk ‘people’. See also Folk 1.
Slovenian: nickname from volk ‘wolf’. Compare Vovk , Wolf , and Wolk .
Slovak: variant of Vlk , from volk, an eastern dialect form of vlk ‘wolf’. Compare Wolk .

variants.name: Voll
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of fifty or more farmsteads all over Norway named Voll, from Old Norse vǫllr ‘grassy field, meadow’. Compare Woll .

variants.name: Vlk
meanings: Czech and Slovak: from the vocabulary word vlk ‘wolf’, probably applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble a wolf or connected with wolves in some way. Alternatively, from an Old Slavic personal name based on vlъkъ ‘wolf’. Compare Volk and Wolf .

variants.name: Vovk
meanings: Ukrainian and Rusyn (partly from Slovakia): nickname from vovk ‘wolf’. Compare Volk , Wolf , and Wowk .
Slovenian: variant of   Volk   ‘wolf’. Compare   Wowk  .

variants.name: Volkmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Guenter, Hermann, Hubertus, Inge, Otto, Ralf.
German: from the personal name Volkmann, an elaborated form of Volk , with the addition of -mann ‘man’.

variants.name: Folk
meanings: German: variant of   Volk   1 and, in North America, also an altered form of this. This form of the surname is also found in Czechia.

variants.name: Pulkkinen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Finnish Antti, Lempi, Markku, Tauno, Eino, Jarmo, Reino, Sulo, Taisto, Teuvo, Waino.
Finnish: probably from the ancient Germanic personal name Volk , meaning ‘people’, + the surname suffix -nen. This surname is found mainly in eastern Finland.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

en.lifeSummary: Anna Volk was born on 2 October 1660, in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire as the daughter of Anna Uhl. She married Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. on 3 May 1687, in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 May 1738, in her hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Volk est née le 2 octobre 1660, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich, fille de Anna Uhl. Elle a épousé Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. le 3 mai 1687, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mai 1738, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Anna Volk wurde am 2. Oktober 1660 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich, als Tochter von Anna Uhl geboren. Sie hat am 3. Mai 1687 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Mai 1738 im Alter von 77 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Anna Volk è nata il il 2 ottobre 1660 nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich come figlia di Anna Uhl. Lei sposato Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. il 3 maggio 1687, nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 maggio 1738, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Volkは1660年10月2日にデウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでAnna Uhlの娘として生まれた。1687年5月3日にデウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでJohann Peter Kumpf Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1738年5月20日に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Volk(은)는 1660년 10월 2일 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 Anna Uhl의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1687년 5월 3일 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 Johann Peter Kumpf Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1738년 5월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Anna Volk nasceu em 2 de outubro de 1660, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Império Alemão filha de Anna Uhl. Ela casou-se com Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. em 3 de maio de 1687, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Império Alemão. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de maio de 1738, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Volk родилась 2 октября 1660 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич. Её мать звали Anna Uhl. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. 3 мая 1687 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 мая 1738 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Anna Volk nació el 2 de octubre de 1660, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich como hija de Anna Uhl. Se casó con Johann Peter Kumpf Jr. el 3 de mayo de 1687, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, Deutsches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1738, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
